name: Clickatell SMS & Messaging API
what_it_calls: SMS and messaging API platform for sending bulk SMS, WhatsApp Business messages, and omnichannel notifications — one of the longest-established SMS API providers with global coverage across 220+ countries.
what_it_does: Global SMS and messaging API platform for sending SMS, WhatsApp, and chat commerce messages — providing one of the broadest country coverage APIs for transactional and bulk messaging with 25+ years of telco industry experience.
use_cases: Sending SMS OTPs and transactional notifications to 220+ countries via REST API
Bulk SMS campaigns and marketing messages programmatically
WhatsApp Business messaging for customer support and notifications
Chat commerce workflows combining messaging with payment triggers
Two-way SMS for customer interaction and automated response systems
not_for: Ultra-low-cost bulk SMS requiring cheapest-possible per-message pricing
Real-time voice communication (use Twilio or Vonage for voice)
Teams needing developer-first programmable messaging with advanced SDK
best_when: A team needs reliable SMS delivery to global markets with established telco relationships, regulatory compliance, and long track record for enterprise messaging.
avoid_when: You need lowest-cost SMS at high volume, developer-first API design, or real-time voice.

auth.notes: API key from Clickatell account. Passed as Authorization header or query parameter. Account-scoped access. Sub-account management for resellers. Token-based auth for HTTP API.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-per-message; pricing varies by country and channel. SMS from $0.003/message
pricing.notes: Volume-based pricing with prepaid or postpaid options. One of the older players (founded 1997). Enterprise contracts available. Strong compliance and regulatory expertise across global markets.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per account; high throughput available on enterprise plans

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API well-documented with multi-language SDKs. Webhook support for delivery receipts and inbound messages. Error codes include telco-specific delivery failure reasons. Good two-way messaging support.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Message sends create new messages — no idempotency key support. Delivery receipt queries are idempotent reads. Retry of failed sends creates new messages.
known_agent_gotchas: Sender ID registration required for many countries — regulatory compliance step
Pricing varies significantly by destination country — cost estimation requires country mapping
Delivery receipt timing varies by carrier — async processing required
WhatsApp requires separate Business API approval from Meta

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. API key auth. SOC2 and ISO 27001 certified. GDPR compliant. 25+ years in regulated telco industry. Enterprise compliance expertise across global markets.
